prompt: Build a compact medieval watchtower with a crenelated top and a simple entrance.
Build a desert sandstone shrine with a raised platform and four corner pillars.
Build a small alpine cabin with a steep roof and a tiny chimney.
Build a canal-side brick warehouse with large doors and a loading awning.
Build a futuristic glass observatory with a circular dome and support struts.
Build a Japanese-inspired gatehouse with layered rooflines and balanced symmetry.
Build a cliffside lighthouse with a narrow shaft and a beacon room at the top.
Build a ruined stone archway overgrown with a secondary support buttress.
Build a colorful market stall cluster with canopies and stacked crates.
Build a modern hillside villa with terraces, overhangs, and large windows.
Build a giant mushroom grove centerpiece with one dominant cap and smaller companions.
Build a curling dragon statue coiled around an invisible vertical axis.
Build a whale breaching out of the ocean using a strong curved silhouette.
Build a bonsai-style tree with a thick trunk and asymmetrical branches.
Build a coral-inspired reef cluster with layered organic fins and branching forms.
Build a towering cactus bloom with multiple arms and a flower crown.
Build a sleeping fox sculpture curled into a compact resting pose.
Build a giant sunflower with a tall stem, leaves, and a wide head.
Build a winding vine arch with hanging leaves and a natural bend.
Build a stone golem emerging from the ground with bulky shoulders.
Build a compact steam locomotive with a smokestack, wheels, and a short tender.
Build a windmill with a stout tower and large rotating blades implied in voxel form.
Build a dockside crane with a counterweight and suspended hook.
Build a sci-fi rover with chunky wheels and a sensor mast.
Build a mechanical spider with articulated legs and a central core.
Build a retro robot with a square head, antenna, and expressive arms.
Build a large gear-and-piston machine with interlocking shapes.
Build a small propeller plane parked on a runway with visible wings.
Build a mining drill rig with a heavy base and a pointed front assembly.
Build a ceremonial mech helmet displayed on a pedestal.
Build a grand fountain with multiple basins and a central statue.
Build a festive holiday tree with ornaments and a star on top.
Build a stained-glass rose window mounted in a stone frame.
Build a garden gazebo with open sides and decorative roof trim.
Build a giant chess rook as a sculptural centerpiece.
Build a ceremonial altar with candles and stepped symmetry.
Build a hanging lantern installation with layered supports.
Build a mosaic fish mural standing upright on a backing wall.
Build a flower cart overflowing with colorful arrangements.
Build a clock tower facade focused on the clock face and trim details.
